'''Bizzin Uz''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] guide who was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and would often help offworlders. He was killed by a [[spydr]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
